author: vvo
subject: v1.3.1
body: ## [1.3.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1) (2016-03-07) ### Bug Fixes * **collapsible:** stop duplicating collapsible styling ([7362901](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/7362901)) * **lodash:** stop leaking lodash in the global scope ([91f71dc](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/91f71dc)), closes [#900](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/900)
